---
title: "Labby 4"
output: html_document
---

# Lab 4

:::{.content-visible when-profile="answers"}
<div style="font-style: italic; border: 2px dashed green; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px; margin: 30px;">
This is the sample solutions document. There may sometimes be other ways to answer questions so you should treat this as a good guide rather than an oracle.

Content will appear here.
